headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on ON Semiconductor, Lowers Price Target to $125
summary: Mizuho  analyst Vijay Rakesh   maintains ON Semiconductor (NASDAQ:ON) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $150 to $125.
